# Analytics Hub — Microsoft Copilot & AI Adoption Toolkit

> Eleven open-source Power BI templates, PowerShell exporters, and add-ons from Microsoft's Copilot ROI Advisory Team that turn your tenant's audit logs and Viva Insights data into a complete picture of Microsoft Copilot adoption, impact, sentiment, and readiness. The canonical source is https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/ and https://github.com/microsoft/Analytics-Hub.

## What this site covers

- Eleven open-source reports for Microsoft 365 Copilot, Copilot Chat, Copilot Agents, GitHub Copilot, and Microsoft 365 readiness
- A "Explore Reports" matrix that maps business questions (adoption, ROI, sentiment, license utilization, agent performance, super-user impact) to the right template
- A "Native Reports" reference of what Microsoft already ships in the Microsoft 365 admin center, Viva Insights Copilot Dashboard, Microsoft Purview audit logs, and Power Platform admin center — and where the Analytics Hub picks up
- An interactive data-source diagram showing how Microsoft Graph, Viva Insights, M365 admin center, Purview audit logs, GitHub Copilot APIs, and SharePoint feed each report
- Customer case studies and a public team page

## Primary docs

- Home: https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/
- Explore Reports: https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/find-a-tool/
- Native Reports (Microsoft admin center, Viva, Purview, Power Platform): https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/out-of-the-box/
- Data Sources diagram: https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/data-sources/
- Case Studies: https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/case-studies/
- Team: https://microsoft.github.io/Analytics-Hub/team/

## Reports (canonical repositories)

- AI-in-One Dashboard: https://github.com/microsoft/AI-in-One-Dashboard
- Chat Intelligence Report: https://github.com/microsoft/CopilotChatAnalytics
- Agent Intelligence Report: https://github.com/microsoft/CopilotChatAnalytics
- M365 Copilot Readiness: https://github.com/microsoft/M365UsageAnalytics
- Super User Adoption: https://github.com/microsoft/DecodingSuperUsage
- Super User Impact: https://github.com/microsoft/superuserimpact
- GitHub Copilot Impact: https://github.com/microsoft/GitHubCopilotImpact
- Copilot Adoption & Sentiment: https://github.com/microsoft/copilot-adoption-sentiment-report
- ROI Calculator: https://github.com/microsoft/Analytics-Hub
- Customize Copilot Champion ID: https://github.com/microsoft/customizecopilot
- "What I Did" digest: https://github.com/microsoft/Analytics-Hub
